subcodes.first_line: O 'Attar! Upon thee be the glory of My Name, the All-Forgiving! The fragrance of thy faith hath spread through the cities of remembrance and utterance, of wisdom and exposition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطار علیک بهاء اسمی الغفار عطر ایمانت در مدائن ذکر و بیان و حکمت و تبیان
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
